'''DS-55-6''' was the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] of an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE pilot]] who served<ref name="CSWE" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> DS-55-6 was among the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who fought in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="CSWE" /> where numerous [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] defended the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] against attacking Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. The battle ended with the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station's]] destruction and an Alliance victory over the Empire.<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
DS-55-6 was created for [[2002]]'s [[A New Hope (TCG)|''A New Hope'']] expansion of the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. Identified as the designation of a TIE fighter in that set,<ref name="TCG">{{TCG|set=A New Hope|cardname=TIE Fighter DS-55-6|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/ANH/TIE_Fighter_DS_55_6.webp?v=2}}</ref> the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' would instead identify DS-55-6 as the fighter's pilot.<ref name="CSWE" /> This article assumes that ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' is correct and treats DS-55-6 as the pilot and not the TIE fighter.
